scripts.build: echo 'No build step for Expo dev'
scripts.build:android: expo prebuild --clean --platform android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && echo 'APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/'
scripts.build:android:debug: expo prebuild --clean --platform android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo 'Debug APK (requires Metro): android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/'
scripts.build:ios: expo prebuild --clean --platform ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace DtShowcase.xcworkspace -scheme DtShowcase -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -archivePath build/DtShowcase.xcarchive archive
scripts.build:ios:debug: expo prebuild --clean --platform ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace DtShowcase.xcworkspace -scheme DtShowcase -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator
